messages.content: 润色如下内容：4.	I’m a huge fan of soccer. I used to be the top scorer in my college soccer team.

4. I am extremely passionate about soccer and consider myself a dedicated fan of the sport. During my college years, I had the honor of being selected as the leading scorer for my university's soccer team.
润色如下内容：1.	I am a sensible hedonist who see pleasure as a motivation to pursue success.
1. As a sensible hedonist, I firmly believe in the power of pleasure to drive and inspire individuals towards achieving success.
润色如下内容：2.	I’m a locking dancer. I commute 3 hours to the dance studio every weekend to have classes. When I feel super stressed, I dance till the last bit of my energy is drained.

2. I am a dedicated locking dancer, willing to go the extra mile to pursue my passion. Every weekend, I endure a three-hour commute to reach the dance studio where I eagerly attend classes. Whenever I find myself overwhelmed with stress, I channel my emotions into dancing, allowing myself to push through until I have expended every ounce of energy within me.
润色如下内容：5.	Winter in Denmark has long nights. Usually, it gets dark at 3 or 4 pm. To combat the melancholy mood it brings, I worked out a lot at night.

5. The winter season in Denmark typically brings along with it long nights, with darkness descending as early as 3 or 4 pm. In order to combat the melancholic atmosphere that accompanies these dark hours, I have devised a coping mechanism: engaging in vigorous workouts during the evening. By dedicating myself to physical activity during this time, I am able to uplift my spirits and fend off any feelings of gloom that the winter nights may bring.
中译英：他曾荣获了两年dean's list。
He has been honored on the dean's list for two years.
中译英：工作之余，他曾和我就职业生涯规划的一些问题交流过，我认为他有清晰的职业规划。
In his spare time, he has had conversations with me about career planning, and I believe he has a clear career plan.
润色如下内容：In his spare time, he has had conversations with me about career planning, and I believe he has a clear career plan.
During his free time, he has taken the initiative to discuss career planning with me, and I am confident that he possesses a well-defined and clear career plan.
润色如下内容：Further education has always been an integral part of her academic planning and career development.
Pursuing further education has consistently been a crucial element in her strategic academic planning and career advancement.
中译英：表达了他对深高金的喜爱和认可。
He expressed his love and admiration for Shimao Gold, a deep and high-quality product.
润色如下内容：He expressed his love and admiration for Shimao Gold, a deep and high-quality product.
He passionately conveyed his love and admiration for Shimao Gold, recognizing it as a product of exceptional depth and superior quality.
润色如下内容：I strongly support his ambition.
I wholeheartedly support his ambition.
中译英：强烈的社会责任感
A strong sense of social responsibility.
润色如下内容：A strong sense of social responsibility.
He possesses a profound and unwavering sense of social responsibility.
